trait.title: ReedboundAscetic
trait.Name: [color=#70ff60]Reedbound Ascetic[/color]
trait.Description:
On [color=#ff8030]attack[/color], [color=#ff5050]if[/color] Main-hand is a [color=#ffff50]bare Fist[/color]:

     perform [color=#ffff50]1 extra attack[/color] against the target

The causeway monks strike once with knuckles and once with the reed-whip of their own stance.
trait.Description_Unit: On attack with a bare fist: perform 1 extra attack.

lore.title: ReedboundAscetic
lore.text: The monks of the drowned causeways harden their hands on shrine-stone and strike in paired rhythms, one blow of flesh, one blow of doctrine. Their reeds bend with the marsh-wind, but their bodies do not.
